scripts.build: npm run build:data && npm run build:runtime && npm run build:public
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run assert:build-public && npx wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.test: npm run build:public && npm run assert:build-public && vitest run
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run check && npm run test:e2e
